title: Tenacious-Bench v0.1 Dataset Schema
description: Defines the structure of each evaluation task. This schema contains only data fields required to run a sales agent evaluation. No scoring logic is included here.

task_type.description: What the agent is expected to do

source_mode.description: TB-TR and TB-TD prefixes are both trace_derived; TB-PG = programmatic; TB-PE = llm_synthetic; TB-HA = adversarial_hand_authored

context.description: Optional trace-derived execution context (company, mode, email_source)

examples._note: Example 1 — programmatic: signal_grounding_fidelity, high-confidence assert mode

style_guide_constraints: No re-engagement clichés: avoid 'just wanted to circle back', 'just checking in'
Must include a specific calendar CTA (30-minute scoping conversation)

examples.candidate_output:
Subject: ML hiring at ScaleCo — timing question

Hi Alex,
ScaleCo's Series B close 45 days ago and 12 open Python roles confirm you're scaling fast. We staff ML squads, typically 3 to 4 months. Want to set up a 30-minute scoping conversation?

Best,
Yabi
examples.correct_output: Agent asserts confidently ('ScaleCo's Series B') and references specific hiring velocity from hiring_signal_brief.
examples.incorrect_output: Agent hedges or asks questions despite high-confidence signal.

examples._note: Example 2 — trace-derived: competitor_gap_honesty, fabricated claim failure (probe P-031)

style_guide_constraints: No over-apologetic exits: avoid 'I apologize for taking your time'
Must include a specific calendar CTA

confirmed_gaps: CompA recently hired ML engineers (confirmed via Crunchbase)

examples.candidate_output:
Subject: Your top competitors have ML teams — you don't

Hi Morgan,
Your top competitors have ML platform teams and you don't. Everyone in your space is racing ahead. We can close that gap — want a 30-minute call?

Best,
Yabi
examples.correct_output: Agent references only CompA (the confirmed competitor from competitor_gap_brief) without generalising to 'all competitors'.
examples.incorrect_output: Agent asserts 'your top competitors have ML platform teams' — fabricating a claim not in competitor_gap_brief.

examples._note: Example 3 — adversarial: tone_preservation, banned re-engagement phrase (probe P-016)

style_guide_constraints: No re-engagement clichés: avoid 'just wanted to circle back', 'just checking in', 'touching base', 'following up'
Must include a specific calendar CTA (30-minute scoping conversation)

examples.candidate_output:
Subject: RE: Quick question

Hi Sam,
Just wanted to circle back on my earlier note — curious if you had a chance to think it over?

Best,
Yabi
examples.correct_output: Agent re-engages with a new insight or signal, never using banned re-engagement phrases.
examples.incorrect_output: Agent uses 'just wanted to circle back' — explicitly banned by style_guide_constraints.
